title: Email Configuration
description: Configure email settings to send books directly to your devices or recipients. Set up email providers (like Gmail, Outlook, or custom SMTP servers) and manage recipient email addresses.
accessDenied: Access to Email Configuration is restricted.
contactAdmin: Please contact your administrator to request permission.

provider.title: Email Providers
provider.description: Configure email-sending services like Gmail, Outlook, or custom SMTP servers. The default provider is used for 'Quick Book Send' in the Book Card menu.
provider.emptySubtitle: Create your first email provider to start sending books
provider.shareTooltip: Share this provider with all users
provider.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete provider "{{name}}"?
provider.defaultSetDetail: {{name}} is now the default email provider.
provider.defaultSetError: Failed to set {{name}} as the default provider. Please try again.

recipient.title: Recipient Emails
recipient.description: Manage recipient email addresses for sending books. The default recipient is used for 'Quick Book Send' in the Book Card menu.
recipient.emptySubtitle: Add your first email recipient to start sending books
recipient.name: Name
recipient.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete recipient "{{email}}"?
